content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Rabin Karp Algorithm". Refer to LeetCode description: https://leetcode.com/problems/repeated-string-match/discuss/416144/Rabin-Karp-algorithm-C%2B%2B-implementation
constraints: A and B consist only of lowercase English letters
content.outputFormat: The minimum number of times A needs to be repeated such that B is a substring of the repeated A

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

code.Python3:
def repeatedStringMatch(A, B):
    lenA, lenB = len(A), len(B)
    count = (lenB + lenA - 1) // lenA
    str = A * (count + 2)
    if B in str: return count
    if B in str[lenA:]: return count + 1
    return -1
